title: c2c Class 357 Electrostar Pack [MTR4]
description: Adds the c2c Class 357 fleet to Minecraft Transit Railway
body:
![class 357 sat with doors open, with quiet zone markings, in the blue livery](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/811269a2cbc8347630f795e7b3e828f7a674b861.png)

**Ever wanted to travel to Grays or Shoeburyness? No?**

_Well, now you don't need to with the arrival of the c2c Class 357 Reskin Pack for **MTR4**._

Including the following:

- Class 357 c2c White Refurbished
- Class 357 c2c White
- Class 357 c2c Blue

Each livery includes Quiet Zone markings, alongside a blank Quiet Zone option and fully blank option for the front coach, plus accessible area markings for the second trailer. Additionally, the c2c White variation has a bonus Union Flag option, as fitted to 5 units for HM Queen Elizabeth II's Golden Jubilee!

![Class 357 in c2c blue livery](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/d124c1a42d45882cd9ea9f4f4be8498492df9aa6.png)
